hero.title: Cameroon's circular cocoa agropole
hero.subtitle: Zero-deforestation premium cocoa, OAPI-patented animal feed, EUDR/CacaoTrace traceability. A multi-revenue model serving 1,200 producers and 5,000 families.

partners.title: Partners and industry references
partners.subtitle: Trusted names in sustainable cocoa, animal nutrition and impact investing

poles.subtitle: Our model
poles.title: Two activities, one circularity
poles.description: We valorize 100% of cocoa by-products — beans, husks, biomass — in a circular economy logic.

cacao.label: Activity 1
cacao.title: Premium Cocoa
cacao.description: Post-harvest centralization of fresh beans: collection, controlled fermentation and master drying from 1,200 supported producers.

provende.label: Activity 2
provende.title: Patented feed mill & integrated farm
provende.description: Valorization of cocoa husks into livestock feed « CRI-PROVEND CACAO » — formulation protected by OAPI patent — combined with an integrated broiler and pig farm.
features: -15% vs market · -20-30% for the end farmer

elevage.label: Activity 3
elevage.title: Pilot integrated farm
elevage.description: Pilot farm with 15,000 broilers/year and fattening pigs — fed by the farm's own feed production.

circular.subtitle: Circular economy
circular.title: 100% of the bean is valorized
circular.description: Our closed-loop model transforms every by-product into a resource: husks become feed, droppings become biofertilizers, biomass becomes energy.

impact.subtitle: CSR Impact
impact.title: Zero deforestation, zero waste, zero CO₂
impact.description: Our CSR commitment is backed by the CIMAR-Technopôle program: agroecology promotion, youth and women training-integration, bio-inputs diffusion.

card2.title: 100% circular
card2.text: Husks, biomass, biofertilizers: everything is valorized

map.subtitle: Area of intervention
map.title: The Mungo Basin, cradle of the project
map.description: 6 producer villages, 1 drying factory and 1 integrated farm, in the Moungo department of Cameroon.

investors.subtitle: Investor area
investors.title: Invest in sustainable African cocoa
investors.description: 3.2 Bn FCFA financing sought over 2026-2030 for a mature, differentiated and bankable project. Access our secure data room.

cookies.title: Cookies & privacy
cookies.description: We use strictly necessary cookies (session) and an anonymized analytics tool (Plausible, no cookie). No advertising trackers.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.

contact.title: Let's talk about your project
contact.subtitle: A question, a partnership, a quote? Our team replies within 48 working hours.

projet.title: Our project, our purpose
projet.subtitle: A carefully designed project, rooted in the Mungo Basin terroir, built to deeply transform Cameroon's cocoa economy.

impact.title: Zero deforestation, zero waste, zero CO₂
impact.subtitle: Our CSR commitment is backed by the CIMAR-Technopôle program: agroecology promotion, youth and women training-integration, bio-inputs diffusion.

brevet.title: OAPI Patent — CRI-PROVEND CACAO
brevet.subtitle: International protection for a major agro-industrial innovation: the transformation of cocoa husks into animal feed.

investisseurs.title: Invest in sustainable African cocoa
investisseurs.subtitle: 3.2 Bn FCFA sought over 2026-2030. Mature, bankable, differentiated project. Projected ROI 18-22%.

produits.title: From premium cocoa to patented feed
produits.subtitle: Our full range, traceable and certified. Direct orders from producers or resellers.

activites.title: Three activities, one circularity
activites.subtitle: Premium cocoa, patented feed mill and integrated farm: an economic model designed to valorize 100% of by-products.

actualites.title: Cocoa Ranch & Industry news
actualites.subtitle: Press releases, studies, events and media coverage. Follow the project's progress.

cacao.title: From terroir to container, traceable and zero-defect
cacao.subtitle: Collection, 7-day fermentation, premium drying. CacaoTrace traceability with QR code for every exported lot.

provendes.title: Feed invented from cocoa husks
provendes.subtitle: OAPI patent n°15012 — CRI-PROVEND CACAO formulation. -15% vs market, superior nutritional quality.

elevage.title: A pilot farm closing the circularity loop
elevage.subtitle: 15,000 broilers/year and fattening pigs. Fed by our feed mill. 45-day optimized cycle. Biofertilizers from droppings.
